PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?item ?label WHERE {
  ?item rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = 'en')
  .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?label) , 'fracture zone'))
  .
}
LIMIT 10
